select.note: Select: S1.9 committed. Deps S1.7 (Engine) + S1.8 (core tests) both COMPLETED. Phase-1 predecessors done; no gating conflict (integration test, not content).

plan.note: Plan: test/integration/DeterministicReplay.test.ts. A pure replaySystem<ReplayWorld> that draws nextFloat(state.rng), threads rng forward, and accumulates world.noise += draw.value and world.position += state.input.moveAxis — exercises RNG threading (rng is part of GameState, not global), input dependence, and immutability through the real Engine+System+Clock+StateManager pipeline. runReplay(seed, tape) builds a fresh StateManager+Engine, and for each {delta,moveAxis} frame commits the input then calls engine.tick(delta). Tape is a hardcoded literal mixing sub-step, multi-step, and a >MAX_FRAME_SECONDS clamped spike, with varying moveAxis. Assertions: (1) two independent runs of identical (seed,tape) are deepEqual AND share an identical FNV-1a state hash (REQ-121 'identical final state hash'); (2) run did real work (tick>0, noise!=0); (3) negative guards — different seed -> different hash, different input-tape (same deltas) -> different hash, proving both determinants genuinely matter. No Math.random/Date anywhere.

anchor.note: Anchor: new integration test file only, no source internals touched. Boundaries already known from full reads this session — Engine({systems,stateManager}).tick(realDeltaSeconds)=>GameState; StateManager(initial).commit/getState; createClock/createRng; nextFloat(RngState)=>{value,next}; NEUTRAL_INPUT/InputFrame; GameState<TWorld>. Clock constants FIXED_STEP_SECONDS=1/60, MAX_FRAME_SECONDS=0.25 (spike of 1.0 clamps to 15 steps).

implement.note: Verify: npm test green 60/60 (5 new integration tests). typecheck clean. Determinism regression assertion in place per dm-0003.

verify.note: Integrate: no PKG structural change — S1.9 adds an integration test file only, no new source node or dependency (consistent with S1.8's test-only slices). pkg_hash stays s1-e6f7a8. acceptance.criterion: Replay determinism proven: identical (seed,tape) -> deepEqual + identical FNV-1a state hash across two independent Engine runs; negative guards confirm both seed and input-tape genuinely determine the outcome. Pipeline exercised end-to-end (RNG threaded through GameState, input folded in, immutable steps).
